# MANUAL CAPTURE — `dart compile exe` is fast but needs a real .dart entry
# point; not portable to the fixture generator without more scaffolding.
# Source: /tmp/flart_test_app/bin/compile_test.dart (one-liner `void main() => print('hello');`)
# Dart: 3.11.5 (stable, 2026-04-15)
# Captured: 2026-05-17
# Command: dart compile exe bin/compile_test.dart -o /tmp/dummy_compile
# Stream: stdout
#
Generated: /tmp/dummy_compile
